description_long: This is a classic ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, rounded metal head with two distinct ends: one flat striking face and one rounded peen. The head is dark, likely forged steel, showing a slightly aged patina. The handle is made of wood, gently curved for ergonomic grip, and displays a natural grain with some visible wear and darkening from use. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with the head securely mounted atop the handle. The hammer's overall proportions are balanced, making it suitable for precise metalworking or general utility tasks. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description: A traditional ball-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a curved wooden handle, showing signs of use and wear. The hammer features a flat striking face and a rounded peen for versatile metalworking tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the hammer head, with both the flat striking face and rounded peen visible, and the wooden handle's grain and curvature clearly displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the hammer head and the handle, with the rounded peen and flat face aligned front-to-back.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head, with the rounded peen more prominent and the handle's curvature visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the narrow profile of the head and handle, with the flat striking face facing forward.
attribute_handle_type: curved wooden handle with visible grain, smooth surface, and no additional grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: ball-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one rounded peen, made of dark steel
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible wear and darkening on the wooden handle, slight patina on the metal head
